text: It was such a pleasure to meet Zach! He thoroughly explained the process and walked me through the pricing. I am so excited to get started with them.
author: Alexandra Holt

text: I’ve been going to Removery for a little over a year now and the team is absolutely marvelous. Always so warm and welcoming when I come in. Wish I had more tattoos I needed to remove 😅
author: Kayla Vaughn

text: Everyone was so professional and Sarah made it quick as possible. Much recommended for tattoo removal
author: Ray Salazar

text: So very helpful and informative. Had a consultation and was thoroughly informed on the process and what my journey is going to look like and felt comfortable throughout. So relieving that Removery exists. Looking forward to my first scheduled treatment! :)
author: Shannon M

text: A client of mine referred me to The Removery and I couldn’t be happier! I was thrilled that they offer payment plans and total removal packages. The staff (South Congress location) was very friendly and made the process easy and seamless. They’ve been great with explaining the process and walking me through the steps, which put me much more at ease. I just did my third session and I’m very happy to see my tattoo fading after each visit.  I am trusting the process even though it’s a lengthy one, I know I’m in good hands!
author: Vanessa Hester
